title: Can we extract all the data from monday.com of workspace? by providing workspace id?
excerpt: Can we extract all the data from monday.com of workspace? by providing workspace id?..I wanted to fetch all the data from Monday.com how should I proceed with that

posts.author: AditeeR (Aditee Raipurkar)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we extract all the data from monday.com of workspace? by providing workspace id?..I wanted to fetch all the data from Monday.com how should I proceed with that

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @AditeeR ,

Matias here! If you want to extract the data inside your boards you will have to use our API querying for the column values inside the items of your boards.

There is no way of doing that in a single call or using only the workspace ID.

Cheers,
Matias
